nodes.context: Powerful Neapolitan Camorra clan operating from Marano di Napoli, active 1960s-2000s.
Camorra clan that succeeded the Nuvoletta clan in Marano.
Camorra clan that succeeded the Nuvoletta clan.
Camorra clan dealing in contraband cigarettes, which the Nuvolettas initially joined in the 1960s.
Federation of Camorra clans formed to contrast the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
Camorra clan led by Michele Zaza, with strong ties to Cosa Nostra.
Camorra clan from Torre Annunziata, ally of the Nuvolettas.
Camorra clan led by Antonio Bardellino from San Cipriano d'Aversa.
Camorra clan led by Carmine Alfieri.
Camorra clan of Poggiomarino led by Pasquale Galasso.
Camorra clan of the Vesuvius area led by Mario Fabbrocino.
Camorra clan from Naples' quarter Forcella led by Luigi Giuliano.
Camorra clan from Portici led by Luigi Vollaro.
Camorra organization led by Raffaele Cutolo, opposed by the Nuova Famiglia.
Sicilian Mafia, with which the Nuvoletta clan had close links.
Sicilian Mafia faction from Corleone, allied with the Nuvoletta clan.
Camorra clan allied with the Nuvoletta clan.
Defunct Camorra clan allied with the Nuvoletta clan.
Camorra clan rival to the Nuvoletta clan.

edges.evidence_quote: the clan was succeeded by the Polverino and Orlando clans
edges.context: The Polverino clan succeeded the Nuvoletta clan after its decline.

edges.evidence_quote: the clan was succeeded by the Polverino and Orlando clans
edges.context: The Orlando clan succeeded the Nuvoletta clan after its decline.

edges.evidence_quote: Ciro, Lorenzo and Angelo Nuvoletta initially joined the clan of Antonio Maisto
edges.context: The Nuvoletta brothers initially joined the Maisto clan in the 1960s.

edges.evidence_quote: The Nuvoletta clan first began to appear in the news at the same time the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed.
edges.context: The Nuvoletta clan was a member of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of Michele Zaza
edges.context: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... the Gionta clan
edges.context: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... Antonio Bardellino
edges.context: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... the Alfieri clan
edges.context: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... the Galasso clan
edges.context: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... the Fabbrocino clan
edges.context: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... the Giuliano clan
edges.context: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuova Famiglia (NF) was formed. The NF was a federation of Camorra clans which apart from the Nuovoletta clan, consisted of ... the Vollaro clan
edges.context: Both were members of the Nuova Famiglia federation.

edges.evidence_quote: It was formed to contrast the growing power of Raffaele Cutolo's Nuova Camorra Organizzata (NCO).
edges.context: The Nuova Famiglia was formed to oppose the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.

edges.evidence_quote: On 10 June 1984, a commando of approximately fifteen armed men led by Antonio Bardellino attacked the Nuvoletta stronghold
edges.context: Bardellino's clan attacked the Nuvoletta clan, killing Ciro Nuvoletta.

edges.evidence_quote: the gunmen opened fire on individuals linked to Valentino Gionta, the closest ally of the Nuvolettas
edges.context: The Gionta clan was the closest ally of the Nuvolettas.

edges.evidence_quote: the Nuvolettas had very close links with the Sicilian Mafia
edges.context: The Nuvoletta clan had close links with the Sicilian Mafia (Cosa Nostra).

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Cosa Nostra Corleonesi
edges.context: The Nuvoletta clan was allied with the Corleonesi faction of Cosa Nostra.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Licciardi clan
edges.context: The Licciardi clan was an ally of the Nuvoletta clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Lubrano-Ligato clan (defunct)
edges.context: The Lubrano-Ligato clan was an ally of the Nuvoletta clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Alfieri clan (defunct)
edges.context: The Alfieri clan was a rival of the Nuvoletta clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Galasso clan (defunct)
edges.context: The Galasso clan was a rival of the Nuvoletta clan.

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Casalesi clan
edges.context: The Casalesi clan was a rival of the Nuvoletta clan.
